info.slogan: More than 50 years of experience and service
info.description: SERVICES is Grupo EMINSA's business unit focused on providing specialized on-site technical support, offering maintenance, repair, and comprehensive support to ensure the efficiency, safety, and operational continuity of our clients' electrical transformers.

1.descripcion: Assessment of current conditions, detection of potential risks, and preparation of a comprehensive equipment diagnosis.

2.descripcion: Findings-based maintenance: work execution according to the results of the initial diagnosis.

3.descripcion: Validation of the work performed, confirmation of transformer operability, and delivery of a technical report.

preventivo.descripcion: Scheduled inspections, diagnostic testing, and condition monitoring to anticipate failures and extend the useful life of your equipment.
preventivo.descripcionLarga: At EMINSA Services, we understand that the reliability of your transformers is key to the continuity of your operations. Our Preventive and Predictive Maintenance program is designed to anticipate failures, minimize risks, and extend the useful life of your equipment. Through scheduled inspections, diagnostic testing, and condition monitoring, we ensure that each transformer operates at optimal parameters, reducing unplanned downtime and optimizing operating costs.

beneficios.4: Safety and continuity in power distribution

0.descripcion: Assessment of external condition, connections, bushings, and components using infrared thermography.

1.descripcion: Dielectric oil analysis, insulation resistance measurement, power factor, and turns ratio testing.

2.descripcion: Continuous tracking of critical parameters to detect degradation trends.

3.descripcion: Delivery of a detailed technical report with findings, diagnosis, and recommended action plan.

correctivo.descripcion: On-site corrective maintenance solutions, ensuring quick and efficient response to failures.
correctivo.descripcionLarga: At EMINSA Services, we offer on-site corrective maintenance solutions, ensuring quick and efficient response to failures or conditions that compromise the operation of your transformers. Our specialized technicians are trained to intervene directly in the field, reducing downtime and avoiding unnecessary equipment transport.

alcance.0: Cosmetic rehabilitation: paint application and label replacement
alcance.4: Replacement of critical components (bushings, inserts, breathers, valves, connectors)

integral.descripcion: Complete service combining inspection, execution, and final verification for maximum reliability.
integral.descripcionLarga: Our Comprehensive Field Maintenance service guarantees complete transformer care, combining inspection, execution, and final verification to ensure maximum equipment reliability. This service is designed to cover all phases necessary in transformer care: from initial assessment to post-maintenance verification.

0.descripcion: Assessment of current conditions and detection of potential risks.

1.descripcion: Execution of work according to the results of the initial diagnosis.

2.descripcion: Validation of work performed and confirmation of transformer operability.

revisiones.descripcion: Specialized technical evaluations to determine the actual condition and remaining useful life of your transformers.
revisiones.descripcionLarga: Our Technical Reviews and Diagnostics service provides a thorough assessment of your transformers' condition. We use state-of-the-art equipment and advanced diagnostic techniques to precisely determine operating conditions, identify potential problems, and recommend corrective or preventive actions.

0.descripcion: Physicochemical tests, dissolved gas chromatography, and furan analysis.

1.descripcion: Insulation resistance measurement, power factor, turns ratio, and winding resistance.

2.descripcion: Detection of hot spots, loose connections, and overheating components.

3.descripcion: Inspection of tank, radiators, bushings, valves, and external accessories.

asesoria.descripcion: Specialized consulting to optimize the management of your electrical assets and maximize return on investment.
asesoria.descripcionLarga: Our team of engineers and specialists offers comprehensive technical advisory to help you make the best decisions about your transformers and electrical systems. From equipment selection to maintenance planning, we accompany you at every stage to maximize the efficiency and reliability of your infrastructure.

especiales.descripcion: Customized solutions for unique requirements that go beyond conventional maintenance.
especiales.descripcionLarga: EMINSA Services offers tailored solutions to meet our clients' special requirements. Whether it is equipment relocation, component modernization, or a particular intervention, we have the experience and resources to execute any special project related to electrical transformers.

emergencias.descripcion: Specialized rapid response service for critical situations, available 24/7.
emergencias.descripcionLarga: We understand that emergencies have no schedule. Our rapid response team is available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, to handle any critical situation that puts your transformers' operation at risk. We guarantee minimal response times and effective actions to restore normal operation as quickly as possible.

ingenieria.descripcion: Comprehensive solutions from design to execution of complex electrical projects.
ingenieria.descripcionLarga: Our engineering department offers complete design, planning, and management services for electrical projects. From substations to distribution systems, we cover all project stages ensuring quality, regulatory compliance, and execution efficiency.

0.descripcion: Requirements analysis, solution design, and preparation of plans and technical specifications.

1.descripcion: Activity scheduling, resource management, and client coordination.

2.descripcion: Equipment installation, wiring, connections, and commissioning tests.

3.descripcion: Energization, functional testing, and formal project delivery with technical documentation.

laboratorio.descripcion: Specialized dielectric oil analysis in partnership with SD Myers, a world leader in diagnostics.
laboratorio.descripcionLarga: In partnership with SD Myers, the world leader in transformer diagnostics, we offer a complete dielectric oil analysis and laboratory testing service. Our results enable informed decisions about the maintenance and operation of your equipment, anticipating problems before they become costly failures.

alquiler.descripcion: Equipment available to cover temporary needs or respond to emergencies.
alquiler.descripcionLarga: We have a large inventory of transformers available for temporary rental. Whether for construction projects, industrial expansions, scheduled maintenance, or emergencies, we offer flexible solutions with fast delivery, installation included, and 24/7 technical support.

p1.titulo: Preventive Maintenance - Industrial Free Trade Zone
p1.descripcion: Comprehensive preventive maintenance program for 50 distribution transformers in an industrial free trade zone.
p1.detalles: A preventive-predictive maintenance program was implemented that included quarterly thermographic inspections, semi-annual dielectric oil analysis, routine electrical testing, and continuous monitoring of operating conditions. The program reduced unplanned failures by 85% during the first year of implementation.

resultados.3: Estimated useful life extension of 8-10 years

p2.descripcion: Restoration of electrical service after a hurricane, including assessment, repair, and installation of transformers.
p2.detalles: After the hurricane, an emergency team of 25 technicians was mobilized within the first 6 hours. 120 affected transformers were assessed, 85 were repaired on site, and 35 units were replaced with temporary rental equipment. Electrical service was restored to 95% within the first 72 hours.

p3.descripcion: Design, installation, and commissioning of a complete electrical substation for a premium shopping mall.
p3.detalles: Turnkey project that included substation design, equipment selection, permit management, installation of 3 x 2,500 kVA transformers, medium voltage distribution system, Schneider Electric switchgear, and remote monitoring system. The project was completed 2 weeks ahead of schedule.

p4.descripcion: Comprehensive maintenance of 8 power transformers at a cement production plant.
p4.detalles: Comprehensive maintenance was performed on 8 power transformers (2,000-10,000 kVA) during the plant's scheduled shutdown. The scope included tank and radiator cleaning, dielectric oil change, gasket and seal replacement, complete electrical testing, and exterior anticorrosive coating.

p5.descripcion: Sampling and dielectric oil analysis campaign for 200 transformers in the distribution network.
p5.detalles: In partnership with SD Myers, a diagnostic campaign was executed that included oil sampling from 200 transformers, dissolved gas analysis (DGA), dielectric strength, moisture content, acidity, and furan analysis. The results allowed prioritizing 35 units for immediate intervention and planning maintenance for the remaining units.

p6.descripcion: Temporary power supply during the expansion of the hotel complex.
p6.detalles: 6 Pad Mounted transformers were provided on rental (225-1,000 kVA) for 8 months to cover temporary power needs during the construction phase of the new hotel wing. Transport, installation, commissioning, monthly maintenance, and deinstallation upon project completion were included.

t1.testimonio: Since we implemented the preventive maintenance program with EMINSA, our unplanned failures were reduced by 85%. Their technical team is highly professional and always meets established timelines.

t2.testimonio: EMINSA's response during the post-hurricane emergency was exceptional. In less than 6 hours they already had a team in the field, and within 72 hours we had restored 95% of service. They are true strategic allies.

t3.testimonio: The substation project was executed flawlessly. EMINSA not only met all technical specifications but delivered 2 weeks ahead of schedule. The quality of their engineering is first-rate.

t4.testimonio: The comprehensive maintenance during our scheduled shutdown was executed with military precision. All 8 transformers were left in optimal condition and the plant started up without any setbacks. Excellent service.

t5.testimonio: EMINSA's laboratory analyses, in partnership with SD Myers, allowed us to identify 35 transformers that required urgent intervention. Thanks to that, we avoided failures that would have cost us millions.

t6.testimonio: The transformer rental service was key to our expansion project. EMINSA provided us with reliable equipment, professional installation, and impeccable maintenance throughout the 8-month contract.

r1.descripcion: Request a maintenance, repair, or inspection service for your transformers.

r2.descripcion: Tool to calculate the required transformer capacity based on your load.

info.tagline: More Than 50 Years of Excellence in the Electrical Sector
info.slogan: Comprehensive Solutions in Transformers and Electrical Equipment
info.description: GRUPO EMINSA is a leader in the Dominican Republic and the Caribbean in the manufacturing, repair, and commercialization of electrical distribution transformers and related equipment. With more than 50 years of experience, we offer comprehensive solutions backed by the highest international quality standards.

0.title: Proven Experience
0.description: More than 50 years specializing in electrical distribution transformers in the Caribbean.

1.title: Certified Quality
1.description: ISO 9001:2015 certification and compliance with ANSI, IEEE, and DOE standards.

2.title: Comprehensive Solutions
2.description: From manufacturing to maintenance, repair, and commercialization services.

3.title: Regional Reach
3.description: Consolidated presence in the Dominican Republic and the Caribbean.

about.title: Grupo EMINSA
about.description: GRUPO EMINSA is a leading business organization in the Dominican Republic and the Caribbean, with more than 50 years of experience in the electrical distribution transformer sector and related equipment. We specialize in offering comprehensive solutions that include manufacturing, repair, remanufacturing, commercialization, and specialized technical services.
about.mission: To provide reliable, innovative, and quality solutions in transformers and electrical equipment, acting with transparency, integrity, and dedication in every project. Our commitment is to exceed our clients' expectations, guaranteeing exceptional technical service backed by decades of experience.
about.vision: To be the leading reference in the Caribbean for the manufacturing, repair, and commercialization of electrical transformers, recognized for our technical excellence, constant innovation, and commitment to the sustainable development of the energy sector.

0.title: Excellence
0.description: We strive to exceed expectations in every project, ensuring the highest quality in our products and services.

1.title: Integrity
1.description: We act with honesty, transparency, and ethics in all our business relationships and operations.

2.title: Commitment
2.description: We fulfill our promises and take full responsibility for our products, services, and the impact we generate.

3.title: Innovation
3.description: We constantly seek better ways to serve our clients, adopting new technologies and improving our processes.

about.team: We have a team of highly trained multidisciplinary professionals, engineers, technicians, and specialists committed to providing the best possible solutions. Our staff receives ongoing training to stay up to date with the latest technologies and industry standards.
about.position: In the Dominican Republic and the Caribbean, GRUPO EMINSA has established itself as the reference specialist in electrical transformers. Our trajectory of more than five decades, combined with our technical capacity and commitment to quality, has allowed us to earn the trust of hundreds of clients across various industrial, commercial, and residential sectors.

mtn.description: Manufacturing of distribution transformers with the highest international quality standards.

rst.description: Specialists in the repair and remanufacturing of distribution and industrial transformers.

eic.description: Exclusive representatives of the best international brands in electrical equipment.

servicios.description: Maintenance, repair, and technical support of electrical transformers in the field.

0.description: First company in the Dominican Republic for the manufacturing and repair of electrical distribution transformers.

details.0: On September 14, 1973, the Empresa de Ingenieria Electrica SAS (EMINSA) was incorporated, as a result of the merger of Dominican capital with the Chilean multinational company Hernan Briones y Compania.
details.1: It is the first company established in the Dominican Republic for the manufacturing and repair of electrical distribution transformers.
details.2: In 1979, the company acquired the machinery and equipment from Canadian General Electric, advised by the Canadian firm Ferranti Packard Transformers.
details.3: The Pad Mounted transformer was introduced to the market, once again pioneering in this range.

achievements.0: First transformer factory in the Dominican Republic
achievements.1: Pioneering Dominican-Chilean merger in the sector
achievements.2: Introduction of the Pad Mounted transformer to the market

1.description: Exports to Haiti and Turks & Caicos, and agreement with Energy International Corporation USA.

details.0: In the late 1980s, EMINSA made its first exports to the Republic of Haiti, as well as to the Turks & Caicos Islands through an electrical contractor.
details.1: In 1996, a technical assistance and raw material supply agreement was signed with the international division of Energy International Corporation in the United States, a firm with more than 100 years of experience.
details.2: The agreement covered especially the area of electrical substations and power generation projects.

achievements.0: First exports to the Caribbean and Haiti
achievements.1: Alliance with Energy International Corporation USA

2.event: A New Millennium: Diversification and Growth
2.description: Distribution of Medium Voltage Switchgear, Dutch PUM advisory, and official ABB distribution.

details.0: In 2002, driven by a spirit of constant innovation and customer needs, EMINSA began the distribution of Medium Voltage Switchgear and Transformation Centers.
details.1: In 2003, EMINSA received advisory from PUM (Netherlands Senior Experts Program), who redesigned business operations, focusing them on the commercialization of services based on the flexibility and innovation of experienced subcontractors.
details.2: In 2006, EMINSA undertook the distribution of ABB, Inc. transformers and equipment, maintaining a stock of transformers available for its clients.
details.3: EMINSA was designated as an authorized company for evaluation, diagnostics, and repair services for equipment manufactured by General Electric, CO. in the Dominican Republic.

achievements.1: Operational redesign with Dutch PUM advisory
achievements.3: Authorized General Electric service in the Dominican Republic

3.description: Agreements with an Ecuadorian manufacturer, Schneider Electric USA, and ELPROM TRAFO Bulgaria.

details.0: In 2018, a representation agreement was signed with an Ecuadorian Transformer manufacturer, with its own cutting-edge technology and highly qualified professionals, technicians, and operators.
details.1: In 2019, EMINSA signed a distribution contract with Schneider Electric USA, a global specialist in energy management and automation with operations in more than 100 countries.
details.2: That same year, a representation and distribution contract was signed with the Bulgarian company ELPROM TRAFO, which holds the IEC (International Electrotechnical Commission) standard.

achievements.0: Representation of an Ecuadorian transformer manufacturer

4.description: Preparation to open the first 100% new transformer factory in the Caribbean.

details.0: EMINSA relocated its operations to Duarte Industrial Park.
details.1: Preparation began to open the first 100% new transformer factory in the Caribbean.

achievements.0: New facilities at Duarte Industrial Park
achievements.1: Preparation of the first MTN factory in the Caribbean

5.event: First MTN Prototypes, ISO 9001, and CEPM Certification
5.description: Release of the first new EMINSA transformers manufactured under ANSI / DOE 2016 standards.

details.0: The first prototypes of the new EMINSA transformer line were released, manufactured under ANSI standards and with DOE 2016 efficiency.
details.2: CEPM received one of the prototypes of the new EMINSA transformers for technical evaluation.
details.3: After completing the testing and validation process, CEPM certified the transformers manufactured by EMINSA for use in their distribution networks.

achievements.0: First MTN prototypes under ANSI / DOE 2016 standards
